youtube-BB2mT62LMoM_file0.desc:
ULULE de NOOB la saison Ultime :
https://fr.ulule.com/noob-saison-ultime

NOOB est aussi devenu un véritable jeu vidéo dispo sur Steam ici : https://store.steampowered.com/app/1623880/Noob__Les_SansFactions/

Et voici le film 1 de la trilogie NOOB en intégralité sur Internet. Il s'agit de la saison 6 de la web-série. Un immense merci à la communauté de nous avoir aidé avec ce crowdfunding légendaire, record d'Europe ^^

Pour rappel, voici comment s'articule la web-série NOOB :

CYCLE 1 = saisons 1 à 5
CYCLE 2 = saisons 6 à 8 (trilogie)
CYCLE 3 = saisons 9 à 11

alexis-gideon-video-musics-ii-sun-wu-kon.show: Alexis Gideon Video Musics II Sun Wu Kong
alexis-gideon-video-musics-ii-sun-wu-kon.episode: Alexis Gideon Video Musics II Sun Wu-Kong.mp4
alexis-gideon-video-musics-ii-sun-wu-kon.desc: "Video Musics II: Sun Wu-Kong" is a one hour multimedia video opera based on the 16th century Chinese novel "The Journey to the West". The project combines line drawing and watercolor animation as well as stop motion and claymation. It has musical contributions from Rachel Blumberg (M Ward, Arch Cape), Cory Gray (Norfolk & Western, Carcrashlander), Shelley Short (Hush) as well as visual contributions from Cynthia Star (Coraline, Moral Orel, Robot Chicken), Becca Taylor (Punk Planet, Arthur) and Ezra Claytan Daniels (Black Violet, The Changers). The DVD/Vinyl release is on Africantape(EU) / Slowtrain(US) scheduled for fall 2010.
alexis-gideon-video-musics-ii-sun-wu-kon.u: https://archive.org/download/alexis-gideon-video-musics-ii-sun-wu-kong/Alexis Gideon Video Musics II Sun Wu-Kong.mp4

nostalgiaetherealcollection_file48.episode: ABC Movie Night The Day After 1983 Premiere VHS Re-created Edit With Commercials.mp4
nostalgiaetherealcollection_file48.desc:
Welcome to nostalgia central. NostalgiaEthereal's aka The Retro Connoisseur's wide collection of nostalgic content all in one place for everyone caring to go back in time for hours upon hours. VHS recordings ranging from the 90's to 00's, long marathons of obscure television, vintage cartoons and anime, retro drive-in movie projects, TV-movie broadcast recreations, original commercials throughout, Adult Swim-related content, and September 11th-related content. This is a time-machine in the form of a database. As time progresses, more will be added as I acquire more VHS tapes to transfer. So be on the lookout as time moves on for new content uploaded. Archiving these things is HIGHLY important and crucial to preservation of a time period that has long past and must be kept alive through data-hoarding archived media catalogues such as this.
I do not own any of the content shared here. Only for historical preservation and entertainment purposes.
